title: Security: instantsearch.js 4.86.0 pins vulnerable preact@10.28.0 (CVE-2026-22028)
body:
### 🐛 Current behavior

Hi team 👋

`instantsearch.js@4.86.0` depends on `preact@10.28.0`, which is affected by
CVE-2026-22028 (HIGH).

The issue is fixed in `preact@10.28.2`, but the dependency is currently pinned,
causing `npm audit` / `pnpm audit` to fail.

Dependency chain:
react-instantsearch@7.22.0
└─ instantsearch.js@4.86.0
  └─ preact@10.28.0

Suggested fix:
- bump preact to `^10.28.2`

Workaround:
- using package manager overrides

Thanks!

### 🔍 Steps to reproduce

1. Create a new project
2. Install react-instantsearch 7.22.0

   npm install react-instantsearch@7.22.0

3. Run a security audit

   npm audit
   # or pnpm audit / yarn audit

4. Observe the following vulnerability report:

   - Package: preact
   - Installed version: 10.28.0
   - CVE: CVE-2026-22028 (HIGH)
   - Dependency path:
     react-instantsearch@7.22.0
     └─ instantsearch.js@4.86.0
        └─ preact@10.28.0


### Live reproduction

https://codesandbox.io/p/sandbox/github/algolia/instantsearch/tree/templates/instantsearch.js

### 💭 Expected behavior

`instantsearch.js` should not pin a vulnerable version of `preact`.

The dependency should be updated to a patched version (`>= 10.28.2`) so that
installing `react-instantsearch` / `instantsearch.js` does not trigger a
HIGH severity security advisory during `npm audit`, `pnpm audit`, or
`yarn audit`.


### Package version

instantsearch.js 4.86.0, react-instantsearch 7.22.0

### Operating system

_No response_

### Browser

_No response_
